welcome.title: Welcome to your hub
welcome.subtitle: Your personal workspace for knowledge, todos, and projects.

settings.title: AI configuration
settings.subtitle: Configure provider credentials, the default model, and how the orchestrator presents itself in this workspace.

display.title: Display & history
display.subtitle: How the orchestrator appears, and how much conversation history it carries between turns.

historyLimit.label: History limit
historyLimit.description: How many prior messages get pulled into each chat turn (1–200).

defaultModel.title: Default model
defaultModel.subtitle: Used when a conversation does not explicitly pin a model. Only providers with credentials configured here are eligible.
defaultModel.label: Default model
defaultModel.empty: Configure at least one provider's API key to choose a default model.

credentials.title: Provider credentials
credentials.subtitle: Per-provider API keys. Stored encrypted; the plaintext is never returned by any endpoint.

modal.title: API key for {provider}
modal.subtitle: The key is encrypted server-side before storage. Existing keys are never displayed.
modal.label: API key

providers.title: Providers
providers.subtitle: Globally enable or disable an entire provider. Disabling hides every model under it from the picker.

models.title: Models
models.subtitle: Curated model registry. New models become available immediately after creation — no redeploy required.

form.modelId_help: The identifier used by the provider's SDK (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6).

confirm.delete: Delete model "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

ai.title: AI configuration
ai.description: Provider credentials, default model, and orchestrator display preferences.

audit.title: Orchestrator audit log
audit.description: Review every write tool the orchestrator has executed in this workspace.

audit.title: Orchestrator audit log
audit.subtitle: Every write tool the orchestrator runs is recorded here. Use the filters to narrow the view, or click a row to inspect the full payload.

denied.title: You don't have access to the audit log
denied.description: Viewing the orchestrator audit log requires the orchestrator:audit:view permission. Ask a workspace owner to grant it.

error.load: Could not load the audit log

table.title: Actions
table.empty: No actions match the current filters.

denied.title: You don't have access to the orchestrator
denied.description: Using the orchestrator requires the orchestrator:use permission. Ask a workspace owner to grant it.

write.tooltip: Switching to read & write mode requires the orchestrator:write permission.

list.title: Orchestrator
list.subtitle: Past conversations with the assistant. Open one to resume, or start a new chat.

empty.title: No conversations yet.
empty.subtitle: Start a new chat to ask questions about your workspace.

delete.title: Delete this conversation?
delete.body: "{title}" will be hidden from the list. The audit log keeps a reference for traceability.

titleField.label: Title
titleField.description: Saved automatically when you leave the field.

confirm.title: Allow the orchestrator to modify your data?
confirm.body: In read & write mode the assistant can run write tools (creating or editing knowledge base entries, todos, etc.). High-risk actions still require explicit confirmation.

modelPicker.label: Model
modelPicker.description: Only models with configured credentials, tool support, and streaming support are listed.

noModels.title: No models available
noModels.description: Configure provider credentials in workspace settings to use the orchestrator.

messages.title: Messages
messages.empty: No messages in this conversation yet.

composer.label: Message
composer.description: Press Enter to send. Shift+Enter for newline.
composer.noModelsTooltip: Configure provider credentials to send messages.
composer.noPermissionTooltip: Sending messages requires the orchestrator:use permission.

errors.title: Streaming error
errors.connection_lost: The connection dropped. Click retry to resend.
errors.generic: The conversation could not be streamed.

confirmation.title: Confirmation required
confirmation.vaultWarning: The secret will be sent to the LLM provider. Confirm only if necessary.

reason.class: This tool is classified as confirm-only.
reason.bulk: This tool would affect {n} entities (bulk-change rule).

denied.title: You don't have access to projects
denied.description: Viewing projects requires the project:read permission. Ask a workspace owner to grant it.

manage.tooltip: Managing connections, tracking and sync requires the project:manage permission.

list.title: Projects
list.subtitle: Tracked GitHub repositories synced into this workspace. Open one to browse issues, PRs and commits.

tracked.title: No tracked repositories yet.
tracked.subtitle: Add a repo from your GitHub account to start syncing issues, pulls and commits.

filtered.title: No repositories match.
filtered.subtitle: Adjust the filters to see more results.

delete.title: Remove this repository?
delete.body: {full} will be removed from the workspace and its cached issues, pulls and commits will be dropped.

connection.title: GitHub connection
connection.subtitle: Connect a personal access token so we can sync repositories you own or collaborate on.

form.title: Personal access token
form.subtitle: Tokens are encrypted at rest and never displayed again after saving.
form.tokenHelp: Classic PATs need the repo scope. Fine-grained PATs need read access to repository contents, issues and pull requests.

reasons.invalid_token: The token is invalid or has been revoked.
reasons.insufficient_scope: The token is missing required scopes.
reasons.validation_failed: The token could not be validated against GitHub.

revoke.title: Revoke connection
revoke.subtitle: Removing the connection stops syncs. Cached repos and issues are kept unless you tick the purge option.
revoke.purgeLabel: Also purge cached repositories, issues, pulls and commits
revoke.confirmBodyKeep: Cached data will be kept until you remove individual repositories.
revoke.confirmBodyPurge: All cached repositories, issues, pulls and commits will also be deleted.

picker.title: Add a repository
picker.subtitle: Repositories accessible from the connected GitHub account. Tracking a repo schedules background syncs.

empty.title: No repositories returned.
empty.subtitle: Make sure your token has access to at least one repository.

noConnection.title: Connect GitHub first
noConnection.description: You need to add a personal access token before browsing accessible repositories.

empty.title: No issues match.
empty.subtitle: Try a different state or clear filters.

empty.title: No pull requests match.
empty.subtitle: Try a different state or clear filters.

empty.title: No commits cached.
empty.subtitle: Run a sync to populate the latest 50 commits.

list.title: Knowledge Base
list.subtitle: Search, filter, and browse your workspace knowledge.

empty.title: No entries yet
empty.subtitle: Adjust your filters or create a new knowledge base entry to get started.

body.empty: This entry has no content yet.

linkedTodos.title: Linked todos
linkedTodos.empty: No todos link to this entry yet.

create.title: New entry
create.subtitle: Write a Markdown note. Use [[slug]] to link to other entries.

errors.conflict: An entry with that slug already exists. Adjust the title and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

markdown.placeholder: Write your note here. Wikilinks: [[other-slug]] or [[Title|other-slug]].

preview.empty: Preview appears here as you type.

editor.help: Wikilinks: [[slug]] for a plain link, [[Title|slug]] for custom display text. Unresolved targets show with a dotted underline and a ? badge.

categories.title: Categories
categories.empty: No categories yet. Click + to add one.

delete.title: Delete category?
delete.body: The category is removed from the tree. Entries in this category keep their data; the category is soft-deleted and can be restored from the database.

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.subtitle: Triage unprocessed entries with one click.

empty.title: Inbox is empty
empty.subtitle: New AI-generated entries land here for verification.

toast.error: Could not move entry to drafts

trash.title: Trash
trash.subtitle: Restore entries or remove them for good.

empty.title: Trash is empty
empty.subtitle: Soft-deleted entries appear here. Restore or purge them at any time.

delete.title: Move to trash?
delete.body: This entry will be moved to the Trash. You can restore it from there at any time.

purge.title: Permanently delete entry?
purge.body: This will permanently delete the entry. This action cannot be undone.

list.title: Todos
list.subtitle: Plan, prioritise, and finish things one tab at a time.

today.title: Nothing due today
today.subtitle: Overdue items also surface here. Enjoy the calm or schedule something new.

upcoming.title: No upcoming todos
upcoming.subtitle: Items due in the next 7 days appear here. Add a todo with a due date to plan ahead.

open.title: No open todos
open.subtitle: Every active todo lives here. Create your first one to get started.

completed.title: No completed todos yet
completed.subtitle: Finished items show up here, newest first.

create.title: New todo
create.subtitle: Capture a task with priority, due date, tags, and linked KB entries.

fromKb.subtitle: This todo will be linked to the knowledge-base entry that brought you here.

description.label: Description
description.placeholder: Optional Markdown notes — context, links, [[wikilinks]] to KB entries.

parent.label: Parent todo
parent.hint: Optional — make this a subtask. Maximum depth is three.

kbLinks.label: Linked KB entries
kbLinks.hint: Connect this todo to one or more knowledge-base entries.

errors.parentDepth: That parent would exceed the three-level subtask limit.
errors.parentMissing: The selected parent could not be found.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

email-verification-banner.title: Please verify your email address.
email-verification-banner.description: Check your inbox for a verification link.

toasts.impersonation-ended-description: You are now back to your admin account.

sign-in.page-description: Login to your account to continue
sign-in.title: Welcome back
sign-in.footer-prefix: By signing in, you agree to our

sign-up.page-description: Create an account to get started
sign-up.title: Create an account
sign-up.footer-prefix: By signing up, you agree to our
sign-up.email-exists: An account with this email already exists

forgot-password.title: Forgot password?
forgot-password.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot-password.submitted-description: If an account exists with this email, you will receive password reset instructions.
forgot-password.no-email-hint: Didn't receive an email? Check your spam folder or

reset-password.page-description: Create a new password for your account
reset-password.title: Reset your password
reset-password.invalid-link-description: Please request a new password reset link.
reset-password.expired-link-description: This password reset link has expired or been used. Please request a new one.

verify-email.verifying-description: Please wait while we verify your email address.
verify-email.already-verified-description: Your email address was already verified. You can continue using your account.
verify-email.verified-description: Your email address has been successfully verified. You can now enjoy all features of your account.
verify-email.invalid-link: The verification link is invalid or has expired.
verify-email.missing-token: Invalid verification link. Please check your email for the correct link.
verify-email.resend-hint: If you need a new verification link, sign in and request one from your account settings.
verify-email.toast-verified-description: Your email has been successfully verified.

confirm-email.missing-token-description: This email confirmation link is missing a token. Please use the link from your email.
confirm-email.success-description: Your email has been successfully changed to {email}.
confirm-email.error-invalid: This link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new email change.
confirm-email.error-conflict: This email is no longer available. Please try a different email address.
confirm-email.error-generic: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

accept-invitation.page-description: Accept your organisation invitation and create your account
accept-invitation.title: Accept Invitation
accept-invitation.invalid-link-description: Please check your email for the correct invitation link.
accept-invitation.invalid-invitation-description: This invitation link has expired or is invalid.

lockIndicator.notSetUpHint: Set up your master password in Vault settings to start storing secrets.
lockIndicator.lockedHint: Unlock your vault to read or edit secrets.

unlock.title: Unlock vault
unlock.description: Enter your master password to unlock the vault for this session.
unlock.hint: Auto-locks after 30 minutes of vault inactivity.
unlock.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
unlock.master_password_not_set: You haven't set up a master password yet.
unlock.vault.unlock.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment and try again.
unlock.vault.unlock.master_password_not_set: You haven't set up a master password yet.
unlock.vault.locked: Your vault is locked. Unlock it to continue.

setup.title: Set up master password
setup.description: Choose a master password for your vault. This password protects every secret you store. There is no recovery — if you lose it, the vault data is gone.
setup.minLength: Master password must be at least 12 characters.
setup.acknowledgeIrrecoverable: I understand that there is no recovery if I forget this password.
setup.errorEqualsLogin: Use a different password than your login password.

changeMaster.heading: Change master password
changeMaster.description: Re-encrypts every workspace's data key under the new password. Existing vault sessions are signed out.
changeMaster.successToast: Master password changed. Re-unlock to continue.
changeMaster.errorUnchanged: New password must differ from the current one.

reset.heading: Reset vault
reset.description: Hard-deletes every entry in every workspace and clears your master password. This cannot be undone.
reset.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete all vault entries and credentials. There is no recovery.
reset.successToast: Vault reset. You can set up a new master password.

page.title: Vault
page.subtitle: Your encrypted secrets — passwords, tokens, SSH keys.

emptyState.title: No vault entries yet
emptyState.description: Create your first entry to start storing secrets.
emptyState.setupNeeded: Set up your master password to begin

folders.deleteStrategyDescription: What should happen to entries and sub-folders inside?
folders.moveToParent: Move them up to the parent folder
folders.deleteRecursive: Delete them along with the folder
folders.cycleForbidden: Cannot move a folder into one of its descendants.

entry.deleteConfirmDescription: The entry can be restored from the Trash view.

passwordGenerator.title: Generate password
passwordGenerator.noClassesSelected: Select at least one character class.

audit.subtitle: Every state change and reveal is recorded here.
